name: After-School Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix soy flour, milk powder, wheat germ, raisins, and dates.
2. In a small bowl, mix cottage cheese, eggs, water, honey, vegetable oil, and vanilla extract.
3. Add the cheese mixture to the dry ingredients and blend until a stiff dough forms.
4. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
5. Microwave at full power for 3-5 minutes or until the bottoms are firm.
Makes 3 dozen cookies.
Microwave time: 3-5 minutes. Conventional oven time: 10-15 minutes at 325°F.
